events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still performing like no other! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on this day in 1981, forever changing the music industry with its 24/7 music video format.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill radio, or just make it better?

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Cast your mind back to '94! Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' on this day, kicking off a Britpop revolution. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, took place on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. If you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see?

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: The King Lives On
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. Elvis Presley, who would have been 91, left an indelible mark on music. What's your all-time favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Legendary Flow
angles.copy: Remembering a voice that shaped a generation. Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55, left us far too soon. What's his most impactful track for you?

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Today we remember guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day and would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Wizard
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 today. His legacy continues to inspire. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Walk This Way
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road' and one of the most famous album covers ever. What's your favourite track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that still captivates. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and distinctive voice of Britpop, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your go-to Oasis anthem or solo track?

events.title: John Lennon's Imagine turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic solo album 'Imagine' on this day in 1975, featuring the timeless title track.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its powerful message of peace. What does it mean to you?

events.title: First iPod launched in 2001
events.blurb: Apple launched the revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, changing how we listen to music forever.

angles.name: Pocket Full Of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple dropped this game-changer, putting 1,000 songs in our pockets. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic spy and the release of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, what's your favourite thing about 007?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the visionary musician and peace activist John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: A Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Thinking of John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite moment from this comedy genius?

events.title: The Beatles' White Album turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: The Eclectic White Album
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles dropped 'The White Album'. A truly diverse and experimental masterpiece. What's your favourite deep cut from it?
